name: Radiant Typhoon Vision
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>絢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>嵐</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>たる<ruby lang="jp"><rb>見</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
If this card is destroyed by the effect of "Mystical Space Typhoon": You can Set this card. Activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each of these effects of "Radiant Typhoon Vision" once per turn);
● Draw 2 cards, then if you have a "Radiant Typhoon" card or a Quick-Play Spell in your hand, discard 1 of them, or your entire hand if you don't.
● Add 1 "Mystical Space Typhoon" from your Deck or GY to your hand.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
